name: geolyai--geo-content-publisher
description: End-to-end GEO content publishing and distribution orchestrator. Use this skill whenever the user mentions publishing or distributing GEO-optimized content across multiple channels (blog, docs, landing pages, social, newsletter, app updates, etc.), wants to turn one core piece into many channel-specific variants, or wants to make new or updated content highly visible to AI crawlers and generative engines. Always consider this skill when the user combines content optimization, multi-platform distribution, and AI search visibility in the same request.
